chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1428 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For order son o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 16-09-2025 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G a/w Sheraz Ali, AXEN Spur Sub- Division, Sukkur. **** Learned AAG has filed comments on behalf of respondent No.5, which are taken on record; a copy thereof has also been provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. It is stated that the pensionary benefits of the deceased employee are not being released only for the reason that the respondent-department has not communicated to respondent No.5/District Accounts Office, Sukkur, the details regarding the surviving wife/wives of the deceased; otherwise, there is no other impediment in releasing the pensionary benefits. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has already furnished the Legal Heirship Certificate issued by the concerned Mukhtiarkar as well as the Family Registration Certificate issued by NADRA, both confirming that she is the sole surviving wife of the deceased employee, inspite of that the respondents have failed to release the pensionary benefits to which she is lawfully entitled. Under the circumstances, the petition is disposed of with directions to the respondents to release the pensionary benefits within one month in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
